data.description:
Split the c11Tests Xcode target into two targets so pure-logic tests can run without launching a c11 DEV.app XCTest host.

# Problem

Today `xcodebuild test -scheme c11-unit` (and `c11-ci`) launches a `c11 DEV.app` as the XCTest host. The host app's main thread is monopolized by serial test execution for ~22 seconds, so its window beachballs and the operator has to Force Quit it after every local test run. CLAUDE.md's Testing policy says "tests must go to CI" as a result; the original framing as "would crash the operator's running c11" turned out to be imprecise — the operator's main c11 is unaffected, it's the freshly-spawned test-host window that freezes (confirmed with Atin 2026-05-15). But the practical pain — no fast local test loop — is real.

# Audit (done 2026-05-15)

101 test files in c11Tests/. Classifier counts grep hits for: `import AppKit`, `import SwiftUI`, `import WebKit`, `NSWindow`, `NSView`, `NSApp`, `MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice`, `MTKView`, `WKWebView`, `CALayer`, `NSResponder`, `NSEvent`.

- 73 PURE (zero hits) — could run with no AppKit, no host app.
- 28 HOST (1+ hits) — touch UI machinery, need an app host.

That's 72% of the test surface unblockable for fast local iteration. Heavy host-required files by hit count: BrowserPanelTests (163), TerminalAndGhosttyTests (103), BrowserConfigTests (94), CJKIMEInputTests (86), WindowAndDragTests (81), AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests (61). The pure subset includes all Mailbox tests, most Theme tests, all Workspace snapshot/blueprint/converter tests, all Health parser tests, settings/validation/parser tests, CLI runtime tests.

Full classified file list will be regenerated by the delegator and pinned into the plan doc.

# Approach

1. Add a new Xcode target `c11-logic-tests` (or `c11Tests-Pure`) — a bundle test target with no Host Application, no AppKit dependency. SwiftPM library if simpler.
2. Reclassify each test file's target membership in `GhosttyTabs.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj`:
   - PURE files → new target only.
   - HOST files → stay in existing `c11Tests`.
   - Files that grep flagged on a single innocuous symbol (e.g., an `NSEvent` mention in a comment): re-audit per-file and move if safe.
3. Update schemes:
   - `c11-unit` runs both targets sequentially (matches current behavior).
   - New `c11-logic` scheme runs only the pure target — instant, no app host, agent-runnable locally without operator pain.
4. Update CI workflows (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `mailbox-parity.yml`, etc.) to run the new scheme(s).
5. Update CLAUDE.md Testing policy:
   - `xcodebuild test -scheme c11-logic` becomes safe locally.
   - `xcodebuild test -scheme c11-unit` (full + host) still warned against.
   - The "tests must go to CI" rule narrows to "host-required tests must go to CI."

# Risks

- pbxproj surgery is fragile. Hand-edits risk corrupting the project file. Use the `xcodeproj` Ruby gem or a scripted approach. Avoid raw sed.
- A test classified PURE may still call into Sources/ that brings in NSApp transitively. Discover those by compiling the new target and chasing errors.
- 47 pre-existing main test failures (per PR #164's comparison) won't be fixed by this move. Separately tracked.
- Symbol visibility: if c11Tests-pure links a subset of Sources/, some `internal` types may not be visible. Workarounds: `@testable import c11`, or extract a c11Core library.

# Acceptance

- `xcodebuild test -scheme c11-logic` runs and passes (modulo the pre-existing failures that already fail on main).
- The new target runs in <5 seconds (no app launch overhead).
- Local agent test runs no longer spawn a frozen DEV.app window.
- CI runs both targets; total CI time is no worse than today.
- CLAUDE.md Testing policy updated to reflect the new shape.
- PR #164 merged first to avoid pbxproj conflict (the c11mux→c11 rename touches several test files' contents but not their target membership).

# Out of scope

- Fixing the 47 pre-existing main test failures (separate concern; PR #152 covers 3 of them).
- Headless-ifying the host-required target (the "option 1" we considered and dropped — 20+ window-creation sites, partial benefit only).
- Library-extraction refactor (extract c11Core SwiftPM library). Larger; revisit if `@testable import` proves insufficient.

# Provenance

Identified during the c11mux → c11 rename work in PR #164 on 2026-05-15. Atin invested two Force-Quits validating that PR's test run before we realized this was preventing reasonable local validation.
data.title: Split c11Tests target into pure-logic vs host-required

data.body: Plan v4 complete at .lattice/plans/task_01KRQD33HPPS66DHVKANVA8KWJ.md (worktree). Plan-review iterated 4 times; v4 is the shipped version per delegator/operator decision — remaining nits are punted to implementer judgment. Ready for impl phase.

Implementation complete. Branch `feat/c11-27-test-split` pushed to origin.

**Working against origin/main @ `df85273bb`** (rebased from the plan's `7e0e0b282`; no merge conflicts).

**Commits** (6, separable per plan §3 step 10):
- `d78ba665b` chore(C11-27): pin baseline test failures from origin/main
- `7356782e4` refactor(C11-27): drop unused AppKit import on TerminalControllerSocketSecurityTests
- `12f506a27` feat(C11-27): add c11LogicTests target, move 74 PURE tests off the c11 host
- `1de43d209` feat(C11-27): wire c11LogicTests into c11-logic, c11-unit, c11-ci schemes
- `e00e8f3dc` ci(C11-27): point mailbox-parity at c11-logic, update c11-unit comment
- `3a09ed587` docs(C11-27): rewrite CLAUDE.md Testing policy around the two-target split

**Spike verdict: PASS** on the load-bearing acceptance gate (no `c11(.app| DEV.app)` process launches during the c11-logic test phase). Full c11-logic run: 722 passed, 22 failed, ~61s wall time (Debug, warm DerivedData). Test-phase time ≈10–15 s.

**Strategy chosen: B** (BUNDLE_LOADER + scheme-level c11 dependency), with two adjustments to make it actually link under modern Xcode — see deviations below.

**c11LogicTests file count: 74** (73 PURE + 1 VERIFY-PROMOTE; the AppKit drop on `TerminalControllerSocketSecurityTests` compiled cleanly).

**Failure delta vs baseline:** 21 of 22 c11-logic failures are pre-existing entries in `.lattice/plans/c11-27-baseline-failures.txt` (with the prefix changed from `c11Tests.` → `c11LogicTests.` for moved tests). 1 new failure: `c11LogicTests.MailboxDispatcherGCTests testGCRemovesTempFilesOlderThanFiveMinutes` fails with `NSPOSIXErrorDomain Code=1 "Operation not permitted"` trying to delete a TMPDIR file. Cause: standalone xctest doesn't inherit the c11 DEV.app's TCC permissions for `/var/folders/.../T/`. The sibling test `testGCUsesInjectedClock` — which WAS in the baseline — now passes, so the suite's failure set shifted by one rather than grew. Reviewer call on whether to fix in-scope (likely needs a test-side `mktemp -d` cleanup or skipping in standalone) or punt to a follow-up.

**Deviations from plan** (flagged per the implementer-prompt protocol):

1. **`BUNDLE_LOADER` (Debug) points at `c11.debug.dylib`, not `c11`.** Plan §2.3 specified `$(BUILT_PRODUCTS_DIR)/c11 DEV.app/Contents/MacOS/c11`. Xcode 16+ ships `ENABLE_DEBUG_DYLIB = YES` on the c11 target, which splits the app into a small stub (`c11`) and a 74 MB `c11.debug.dylib` that holds the Swift code; the stub has no `@testable`-visible symbols, so the linker fails with "Undefined symbol: c11.<Type>" across the board. Pointing `BUNDLE_LOADER` at the dylib resolves linking. I also had to add `LD_RUNPATH_SEARCH_PATHS = $(inherited) @loader_path/../../../c11\ DEV.app/Contents/MacOS` so `dyld` can find the dylib at test-load time (3 path components up from the .xctest's `Contents/MacOS`, not 2 as my first attempt assumed). Release keeps the plan-specified `c11.app/Contents/MacOS/c11` path because Release has `ENABLE_DEBUG_DYLIB = NO`. The Ruby script bakes both forms in so future re-runs are reproducible.

2. **pbxproj formatting churn.** Plan §8 acceptance criterion says "no formatting churn"; the `xcodeproj` gem (the plan's prescribed tool, with `sed` explicitly forbidden) unavoidably rewrites the whole file with its own indent style (3-tab → 2-tab). The semantic delta is exactly what §3 step 4 enumerates: one new `PBXNativeTarget`, one new `XCConfigurationList` + two `XCBuildConfiguration` entries, 74 `PBXBuildFile` reassignments, plus a `Cocoa.framework` link entry the gem added for the new target. No existing `PBXNativeTarget` is removed. Took the gem's behavior over `sed` since the plan's "no sed" rule was the stronger constraint.

3. **No CI comparison harness added.** Plan §3 step 1 offered two options for handling the 47-now-81 pre-existing failures: (a) wire a baseline-diff comparator into `ci.yml`, or (b) commit the baseline as evidence and rely on reviewer/hand comparison. I took option (b) — `.lattice/plans/c11-27-baseline-failures.txt` is committed and the CI step is unchanged shape-wise. The harness can land in a follow-up if the manual comparison proves painful. The baseline has grown from 47 (plan-time) to 81 (today) on its own — the plan's "47" framing is now stale; the file is the authoritative source.

4. **Release `build-for-testing` fails for both schemes.** Strict reading of the implementer prompt asked for c11-logic and c11-unit to compile in Debug AND Release. `xcodebuild build` (action `build`) succeeds for both schemes in both configurations because that action only links `buildForRunning=YES` targets (= the c11 app). `xcodebuild build-for-testing -configuration Release` fails on the `@testable import c11` line in BOTH `c11LogicTests` and `c11Tests` because `ENABLE_TESTABILITY = NO` for the c11 target in Release. This is pre-existing — `c11Tests` had the same failure mode before C11-27 — so it isn't a regression introduced by this PR. CI runs Debug, which works.

5. **`c11LogicTests` auto-scheme noise.** With no shared `c11-logic` scheme entry in `xcSchemeManagement.plist`, Xcode autogenerates a scheme named `c11LogicTests` (no dash) per-user. Listing `xcodebuild -list` shows both `c11-logic` (shared, ours) and `c11LogicTests` (auto, per-user). Harmless but slightly noisy; can be suppressed in a follow-up by writing a `xcschememanagement.plist` entry.

**Ready for code-review.** Operator note: the §6 risk register entry on `BUNDLE_LOADER` linkage now has an actual incident attached (deviation #1) that may want to land in the plan history rather than just this comment.

Code-review fixes complete. New commits on feat/c11-27-test-split: c9ae819dd (memory-note), 0b5180a77 (script header sync), 5943e8221 (mailbox-parity comment), b7946ff7e (CLAUDE.md Pitfalls bullet). MAJOR 1 (CI baseline) addressed in PR-description framing at /tmp/c11-27-pr-body.md — 5 baseline failures enumerated with c11Tests -> c11LogicTests prefix mapping, pinned to origin/main@7e0e0b282, baseline-comparison wrapper deferred to follow-up. MAJOR 2 (pbxproj formatting churn) addressed in CLAUDE.md Pitfalls bullet + PR framing. MINORs 3, 4, 5 addressed in commits above. MINORs 6, 7 skipped per reviewer guidance (history-not-worth-rewriting and optional-polish). Ready for delegator to open PR.

Delegator complete. PR #166 open: https://github.com/Stage-11-Agentics/c11/pull/166

Final state:
- Branch: feat/c11-27-test-split (10 commits: 6 impl + 4 fix)
- Plan: v4 shipped, .lattice/plans/task_01KRQD33HPPS66DHVKANVA8KWJ.md
- Code-review: triple-mode merged at art_01KRQMZZVWD31767FTRSB7T4BW; FAIL fixed (2 MAJOR resolved in fix commits + PR-body framing, 3 MINORs addressed in commits, 2 MINORs skipped per reviewer guidance)
- Acceptance: spike confirmed zero c11.app launches during 74-test c11-logic run
- Lattice status: review

Terminal state for the delegator. PR is in human hands.

PR #166 merged to main 2026-05-16T06:43Z (squash b05979184). Split c11Tests into c11LogicTests (74 pure-logic tests, safe locally) + c11Tests (27 host-bound, CI-only). Schemes c11-logic + c11-unit both in tree; CI step "Test c11-unit scheme" runs both targets sequentially. Acceptance met.
